message:
fix: promote error log calls from slog.Info to slog.Warn/Error and add missing error values (#7739)

- server_http.go: 27 resource-fetch errors now logged at Warn (#7692)
- kagent_crds.go: 5 CRD errors now logged at Warn with error value (#7693)
- kagenti.go: 5 HTTP errors now logged at Warn (#7694)
- console_persistence.go: 17 handler failures now Warn/Error (#7695)
- gitops.go: 4 cluster listing errors now Error, ArgoCD sync now Warn (#7696, #7698)
- feedback.go: GitHub API error now Warn (#7697)
- custom_resources.go: cluster/health errors now Warn (#7699)
- mcs.go: invalid request body now Warn (#7700)
- config.go: log warning when HOME unavailable and falling back to cwd (#7689)
- server.go: log info when GPU worker is skipped (#7687)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -142,7 +142,7 @@ func (s *Server) handleKagentCRDAgents(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 
 	dynClient, err := s.k8sClient.GetDynamicClient(cluster)
 	if err != nil {
-		slog.Info("error fetching kagent agents for cluster request")
+		slog.Warn("error fetching kagent agents for cluster", "error", err)
 		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
 		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{"agents": []any{}, "error": "internal server error"})
 		return
